title: Playwrite Magic Growing Rainbow Christmas Tree
description: This Magic Crystal Growing Christmas Tree Kit blends festive fun with hands-on science, making it a delightful activity for kids of all ages. Slip the kit into a Christmas stocking, use it for an end-of-term classroom project, include it in party bags, or bring it out on cold winter days to keep little ones entertained as Christmas approaches. Because the tree grows through a simple chemistry reaction, it also doubles as a mini science experiment that can be completed right at home. Curious young minds will love watching the tree transform as its crystals slowly appear and spread. Getting started is easy: slot the two cardboard trunk pieces together and place the assembled tree in the green base. Gently fan out the branches, add the festive decorations, and pour the magic solution into the base. As the tree absorbs the liquid and the water evaporates, crystals will form, picking up the green dye from the cardboard. Within 24 hours, you’ll see a full, leafy coating of crystals—almost like watching a real tree grow in fast-forward. Finish it off by wrapping the red bead garland around the branches and placing the golden star on top. Once fully grown, the crystal tree stands at approximately 14 cm x 6.8 cm (5.5 in x 2.6 in). Each kit includes: two tree pieces, one green plastic base, two packets of magic solution, plus festive decorations.
